purpose: Reflect audited distribution; evaluate with precision, recall, F1, confusion matrix, not accuracy alone.
Control imbalance so Fase 4 can test feature separability without majority-class dominance.
Moderately imbalanced sensitivity check; still prevents millions of attacks from dominating.
